copyError: Failed to copy link, please copy manually

engineModelHint.builtin: ggml models for whisper.cpp, including Turbo and quantized variants
engineModelHint.fasterWhisper: CT2 models for faster-whisper, including Distil variants
engineModelHint.funasr: FunASR models: SenseVoice multilingual, Paraformer for Chinese, and the shared VAD component
engineModelHint.localCli: Local CLI uses your own Whisper install — no models to download here

localCliModelHint: You are using the local CLI engine. Switch to whisper.cpp to download ggml models here.
fasterWhisperModelTip: faster-whisper uses HuggingFace CT2 models, stored separately from ggml models
modelManagementDesc: The list follows your current engine and shows only compatible models.
importInvalidLayout: The selected folder is not a valid model. Missing files: {{files}}
speedRatingTip: Transcription speed rating, 5 dots is fastest
qualityRatingTip: Transcription accuracy rating, 5 dots is most accurate
quantizedTip: Quantized models are smaller and faster with slightly reduced accuracy. Ideal for limited disk/memory.
modelPathChangedHint: Only the read/write location changes. Existing models in the old folder are not migrated automatically — move them manually or re-download/import.
recommendedBasisWithGpu: Based on {{memory}}GB RAM · GPU acceleration available

tierDesc.fast: Speed first — great for a quick try
tierDesc.balanced: Recommended for daily use, accuracy and speed in balance
tierDesc.accurate: Accuracy first, requires a powerful computer

noInstalledModels: No models installed yet — turn off the filter to browse all models

modelDesc.base: More accurate than tiny, still fast
modelDesc.small: Entry-level balance of speed and accuracy
modelDesc.large-v3-turbo: Near top accuracy at a decent speed
modelDesc.distil-large-v3: Distilled large-v3 — smaller and faster, English only
